details.test: Task 1: Book earliest weekday morning dishwasher repair under $70 in 30301
Task 2: Choose cheapest fridge plan with >=12 month warranty and request quote
Task 3: Select highest-rated technician for 10001 with same-day availability and add to preferred list
Task 4: Book a repair over threshold and apply a valid percent coupon from Deals at checkout
Task 5: Schedule washer and dryer maintenance in one visit with multi-appliance discount
Task 6: Check Samsung RF28R7201SR support and start service request draft
Task 7: Find oven diagnostic fee for 60601 and save it in profile notes
Task 8: Reschedule washer repair R12345 to earliest evening slot at least 3 days later
Task 9: Compare same-day emergency surcharges and book cheapest appliance repair after 1pm
